# Reddy Steady Go LLC

Reddy Steady Go LLC is an Omaha, Nebraska contractor providing concrete, masonry, commercial asphalt paving, parking lot maintenance, mudjacking, and concrete repair services.

## Business Facts

- Legal name: Reddy Steady Go LLC
- Owner / principal contact: Kris Reddy
- Address: 13811 L Street, Omaha, NE 68137
- Phone: (402) 415-9253
- Email: kris@pave911.com
- Website: https://wesleybenoit.github.io/reddy-steady-go-website/

## Services

- Concrete flatwork: driveways, patios, sidewalks, curb work, slabs, foundations, garage floors, stamped and decorative concrete
- Masonry: brick, block, stone, retaining walls, chimney repair, tuckpointing, steps, entryways, hardscapes
- Commercial paving: asphalt paving, parking lots, overlays, sealcoating, crack filling, striping, ADA-conscious layouts, maintenance
- Concrete repair: mudjacking, slab lifting, leveling, crack repair, resurfacing, trip-hazard removal

## Service Areas

Omaha, Papillion, La Vista, Bellevue, Ralston, Millard, Elkhorn, Gretna, and Council Bluffs.

## Buyer And Procurement Notes

Reddy Steady Go LLC works with homeowners, property managers, commercial operators, general contractors, and municipal buyers. Written scope, company details, NAICS classifications, insurance documentation, references, and project-specific review information can be requested directly from Kris Reddy.
